query:
SELECT 
  month, 
  accountId,
  CAST(netPremium AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS netPremium,
  CAST(credits AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS credits,
  CAST(debits AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS debits,
  transactionCount,
  isLocked,
  lastUpdated
FROM monthlyPremiumCache
WHERE month >= '2025-11'
ORDER BY month, accountId;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2m8TNWgPuPvRJRa.1b4cee6bb564 --database dA3LRtUEtHSvLVLz3WfwfJ --execute 
SELECT 
  month, 
  accountId,
  CAST(netPremium AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS netPremium,
  CAST(credits AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS credits,
  CAST(debits AS DECIMAL(12,2)) AS debits,
  transactionCount,
  isLocked,
  lastUpdated
FROM monthlyPremiumCache
WHERE month >= '2025-11'
ORDER BY month, accountId;
